Fixed in batch 3: watcher threads WatcherChangeTypes + tracks known dirs (seed + learned ancestors); directory renames/deletes escalate to a detect-all sweep. 3-round review (8->3->0 confirmed) caught + fixed dotted-dir misclassification and OneDrive-placeholder false exclusion. 68 tests.
Fixed in batch 3: _sync lock + _disposed flag; timer disposed under the lock; ArmDebounce/Flush guarded. Verified across review rounds.

Fixed in batch 3: WorkspacePaths.EscapesViaReparsePoint walks target+ancestors; source_context/refresh/scanner skip symlinks/junctions via LinkTarget (attribute-bit-gated for perf), NOT the ReparsePoint bit (so OneDrive/cloud placeholders stay indexed). Real junction test. Reviewed over 3 rounds.

Fixed in batch 3: _disposed flag + tracked _startTask; Start won't publish/watch after dispose; Dispose waits pump+start and only disposes store if both finished; watcher disposed again post-start to close the race-created leak.
